input.background: The probability density function of a random variable $X$ is defined as follows: $$f(x)= \begin{cases}2 x & 0 \leq \mathrm{x} \leq 1 \\ 0 & \text { otherwise. }\end{cases}$$
input.question: Obtain the cumulative distribution function (CDF) of $X$.

output.answer: The cdf of $X$ is given by $$F(x)= \begin{cases}0 & \mathrm{x}<0 \\ x^2 & 0 \leq \mathrm{x} \leq 1 \\ 1 & x>1 .\end{cases}$$

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
